summary: Completed testing of 5 Philos Orientation frontend features. All backend APIs (19/19 tests) pass. Frontend components render correctly for: (1) Daily Question with Streak badge, (2) Impact message after answering, (3) Share Card modal with download/share, (4) Weekly Insight Section, (5) Orientation Index Page. RTL Hebrew layout working correctly.

issues: Impact message is only shown briefly (4 seconds) during success animation and then disappears. Consider persisting the impact message display longer or showing it permanently after answering.

critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: All 5 backend APIs return correct data structure (daily-question, daily-answer, weekly-insight, share, index)
GOOD: Streak and longest_streak calculated correctly in daily-question endpoint
GOOD: Impact message and impact_percent returned correctly in daily-answer endpoint
GOOD: Share card returns orientation label in Hebrew, streak, and compass position
GOOD: Weekly insight returns distribution with all 4 directions and Hebrew insight text
GOOD: Orientation index returns global distribution, headline, active users, and actions count
GOOD: Frontend DailyOrientationQuestion component displays streak badge when streak > 0
GOOD: Frontend OrientationShareCard modal opens/closes correctly with download and share buttons
GOOD: Frontend WeeklyInsightSection displays distribution bars and insight text
GOOD: Frontend OrientationIndexPage displays global distribution chart with vertical bars
GOOD: All data-testid attributes present for testing
GOOD: RTL Hebrew layout correctly applied throughout
test_credentials: Anonymous user - uses localStorage 'philos_user_id' for identification
seed_data_creation: Tests use existing production data and create new test user for daily-answer testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: 5 features tested: (1) Streak badge in DailyOrientationQuestion shows flame icon + number when streak > 0, (2) Impact message displays briefly after answering daily question, (3) Share card modal accessible from 'שתף את ההתמצאות שלך' button on Home tab, (4) Weekly Insight on Insights tab shows distribution bars and Hebrew insight, (5) Orientation Index on System tab shows global distribution chart with 4 vertical bars.

frontend_tests.Feature 1 - Daily question text displaye: PASS - 'איך תרצה להתחיל את המסע שלך?'
frontend_tests.Feature 4 - Weekly insight text displaye: PASS - 'אין מספיק נתונים השבוע. התחל עם פעולה אחת.'
